Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru-san seems content[n]gnawing on the {f 4 4 0 37 1 16786}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Is something happening...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3082 0 0}Then let me make this clear: you may be our ally for now, but I don't have a single ounce of trust in you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}Oh, trust me, you were already perfectly clear! You made it clear just by how you treat me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}C'mon, guys! Let's just all take a deep breath...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}Hey, Aigis... I still exist, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2030 0 0}Thank you! I wasn't so sure with them actin' like I ain't even here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2144 0 0}Yeah, I guess not... That'd explain why they're actin' like they don't hear anything I say...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}I don't know what started it, but they've been at it since I got here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 7 52 -1 0 0}Whoa, hey! I don't think you wanna get in the middle of this, buddy![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}What!? I'm not being childish at all! I'm just as grown-up as anyone else here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3121 0 0}...I can't believe a dog had to point out I'm getting too worked up...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}All right, enough's enough. I admit that I'm at fault here too. Let's leave it at that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}Damn... One bark and it's settled![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}You're freakin' amazing, Koromaru![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can feel a dignified aura[n]emanating from Koromaru-san...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2111 0 0}If this all proved anything, it's that nothin' can beat that Koromaru charm! I bet I could learn a thing or two from him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}I basically just said I'm less charming than a dog, didn't I...?[n]{f 1 1}
